scripts.build:event-plan-sheet-prep: rm -rf apps/event-plan-sheet-prep/dist && tsc --outDir apps/event-plan-sheet-prep/dist --rootDir apps/event-plan-sheet-prep/src --skipLibCheck apps/event-plan-sheet-prep/src/main.ts && cp apps/event-plan-sheet-prep/appsscript.json apps/event-plan-sheet-prep/dist/appsscript.json
scripts.push:event-plan-sheet-prep: npm run build:event-plan-sheet-prep && cd apps/event-plan-sheet-prep && clasp push
scripts.build:branch-target-sheet-builder: rm -rf apps/branch-target-sheet-builder/dist && tsc --outDir apps/branch-target-sheet-builder/dist --rootDir apps/branch-target-sheet-builder/src --skipLibCheck apps/branch-target-sheet-builder/src/main.ts && cp apps/branch-target-sheet-builder/appsscript.json apps/branch-target-sheet-builder/dist/appsscript.json
scripts.push:branch-target-sheet-builder: npm run build:branch-target-sheet-builder && cd apps/branch-target-sheet-builder && clasp push
